service.heroText: Cargo and liability insurance for every step of the logistics chain.
service.bodyParagraph1: Insurance programmes are tailored to cargo type and route, from basic cover to war and delay risks with top-tier underwriters.
service.bodyParagraph2: We guide policy issuance and claims, liaise with insurers and make sure compensation arrives without delays.

auto.heroText: We organize international road freight with full support at every stage. We handle turnkey projects, from selecting equipment and planning the route to delivery control and unloading. We provide insurance, process coordination, and transparent execution control.
auto.bodyParagraph1: Caravan Logistics organizes international road freight across Central Asia, China, the EAEU, and Europe. We provide end-to-end support for trucking projects, from route planning to unloading control, for both one-off shipments and regular business supply flows. We serve manufacturers, developers, distributors, and trading companies. For each shipment, we select the right equipment based on cargo type, tonnage, volume, and urgency, reducing logistics risks and keeping delivery schedules stable.
auto.bodyParagraph2: We cover the full road-freight cycle, from rate calculation and carrier selection to route control, delivery timing, insurance, and customs support. As a logistics operator with a dedicated manager and transparent pricing, we give businesses stable and manageable international logistics.

cases.title: Road Freight Cases
cases.subtitle: Four project examples with route, shipment profile, support scope, and a short solution summary.

case1.title: Case 1: Development / Construction
case1.desc1: The client needed timely delivery of ventilation equipment for a residential complex at the interior finishing stage. A delay could have pushed the commissioning timeline.
case1.desc2: We assigned a curtain-side truck with side loading, verified the equipment dimensions in advance, and prepared the customs paperwork package. A dedicated manager supervised the border crossing and delivery timing throughout the shipment.

case2.title: Case 2: Retail / FMCG

meta.cargo: Cargo type: household chemicals and fast-moving consumer goods

case2.desc1: The client, a distributor for a federal retail chain, needed regular stock replenishment before a promotional campaign launch.
case2.desc2: Given the tight schedule, we built a fixed shipping plan, aligned loading and unloading slots, and added cargo insurance to reduce risk on the international lane.

case3.title: Case 3: Oversized / Energy

meta.extra: Additional services: oversized permits, escort, insurance, route approvals

case3.desc1: The client was an energy-project contractor upgrading a substation. The transformer had non-standard dimensions and weighed more than 40 tons, requiring a dedicated route and special permits.
case3.desc2: We completed a preliminary route survey covering bridge and tunnel constraints, secured oversized permits, arranged escort support, and coordinated with road authorities. The delivery was completed on schedule without equipment damage.

case4.title: Case 4: Agriculture / Fresh Produce

meta.vehicle: Vehicle type: refrigerated truck (90 m3 road train)
meta.extra: Additional services: temperature control, insurance, GPS monitoring

case4.desc1: The client, an exporter of fresh agricultural produce, needed strict temperature compliance and precise timing for delivery to a retail distribution center.
case4.desc2: We provided a reefer with a +4 C setpoint, configured in-transit temperature monitoring, and maintained GPS route control. The shipment arrived within the agreed unloading window with no temperature deviations and no loss of product quality.

rail.heroText: We organize rail freight across the CIS, China, and Europe and work with both owned and leased rolling stock.
rail.bodyParagraph1: Caravan Logistics organizes international rail freight across Central Asia, China, the EAEU, and Europe. We provide full support for rail shipments, from route and rate calculation to station-by-station control and arrival at the destination terminal, handling both spot shipments and regular supply programs. We serve manufacturers, agribusiness, metallurgy, construction companies, and major distributors. Depending on cargo profile, weight, volume, and lead-time requirements, we select the optimal format: boxcars, gondolas, flatcars, or containers.
rail.bodyParagraph2: We cover the full rail logistics cycle, from rate calculation and rolling-stock booking to movement control, shipping documents, and unloading coordination. With a dedicated manager and transparent pricing, we provide predictable and cost-efficient rail logistics for business.

cases.title: Rail Freight Cases
cases.subtitle: Four project examples with route, shipment profile, support scope, and a short solution summary.

case1.title: Case 1: Metallurgy / Raw Materials
case1.desc1: The client, a metallurgical company, was shipping steel products regularly for construction sites. A gondola car was selected based on the cargo weight and profile.
case1.desc2: We supervised balanced loading and lashing, checked paperwork at the origin station, and completed the shipment within the supply schedule without idle time at destination.

case2.title: Case 2: Agriculture / Grain
case2.desc1: The client, an agricultural exporter, was handling seasonal grain shipments. The movement required sanitary compliance and transport-condition control.
case2.desc2: We selected covered wagons, aligned the loading schedule, and monitored the transit through several stations. The cargo arrived on time with no loss of volume or quality.

case3.title: Case 3: Industrial Engineering / Container Shipment

meta.extra: Additional services: customs support, insurance, terminal coordination

case3.desc1: The client, a manufacturing company, was delivering equipment for an assembly line. A container format was chosen to protect the cargo and simplify transit handling.
case3.desc2: We booked the platform, checked internal packaging and lashing, and provided customs support. The shipment moved without document corrections and without delays at the destination terminal.

case4.title: Case 4: Construction / Project Cargo

meta.cargo: Cargo type: steel structures for an industrial site
meta.extra: Additional services: gauge approvals, insurance, lashing control

case4.desc1: The client was implementing an industrial project and needed large steel structures delivered. The shipment required prior approval of loading parameters.
case4.desc2: We selected the flatcar, checked lashing schemes, and aligned the route with operational restrictions. Delivery arrived on time and prevented a shift in the installation schedule.

multimodal.heroText: We organize international multimodal freight by combining several transport modes within one logistics solution. We deliver turnkey projects, from selecting the optimal transport chain and planning transfer points to controlling every leg and final delivery. We coordinate all participants, provide insurance, and keep timing transparent.
multimodal.bodyParagraph1: Caravan Logistics organizes international multimodal shipments using road, rail, sea, and air transport. This format is used when a single mode cannot meet the client's timing, geography, budget, or cargo requirements. We build route architectures that balance transit time, cost, and operational reliability while keeping one accountable operator across the chain.
multimodal.bodyParagraph2: We provide end-to-end support, from transport-scheme design and mode selection to transfer control, documentation, and terminal coordination. This gives clients one operating center for the entire route and lowers the risk of disruption between legs.

cases.title: Multimodal Freight Cases
cases.subtitle: Four project examples with route, shipment profile, support scope, and a short solution summary.

case1.title: Case 1: Industrial Engineering / Port Logistics
case1.route: Genoa, Italy -> Bucharest -> client's final warehouse

meta.extra: Additional services: customs clearance, insurance, terminal coordination

case1.desc1: The client purchased a production line in Europe for delivery to a plant in Eastern Europe. The optimal solution combined sea delivery to port, a rail leg to the inland terminal, and road drayage to the warehouse.
case1.desc2: We coordinated three transport modes, controlled transfer windows, and handled transit documents. The shipment moved without terminal idle time and stayed aligned with the production start schedule.

case2.title: Case 2: FMCG / Port-Based Import
case2.route: Barcelona -> Port of Rotterdam -> distributor warehouse

meta.extra: Additional services: insurance, temperature control on the road leg

case2.desc1: The client, a distributor for a major retail chain, needed delivery within a precise unloading slot. The sea leg optimized cost, while the road leg ensured schedule accuracy.
case2.desc2: We coordinated container arrival at the port, aligned truck dispatch, and controlled the delivery schedule. The cargo reached the distribution center without timing deviations.

case3.title: Case 3: Energy / Project Cargo
case3.desc1: For this heavy shipment, rail was chosen as the main transport leg, while the final mile was executed by low-bed trailer.
case3.desc2: We completed route engineering, aligned unloading parameters, and organized escort support. The transport was completed within the project schedule and without equipment damage.

case4.title: Case 4: Electronics / Urgent Supply
case4.desc1: The client needed urgent components for a production line. The air leg reduced transit time, while the road leg enabled immediate delivery to the warehouse.
case4.desc2: We arranged accelerated document handling and coordinated every leg of the chain. The cargo arrived within the required deadline, preventing a production stoppage.

china.heroTitle: Freight from China and East Asia
china.heroText: We organize international deliveries from China and East Asia to the CIS and EAEU. We manage turnkey projects, from supplier coordination and cargo consolidation to final delivery control. We coordinate all parties in the chain, provide insurance, and keep deadlines transparent.
china.bodyParagraph1: Caravan Logistics has built a dedicated desk focused on shipments from China by road, rail, and multimodal transport. This direction requires continuous market monitoring, a strong understanding of import-export regulation, and resilient transit planning. We design tailored delivery schemes based on cargo profile, supplier specifics, production readiness, and destination-country requirements, supporting both standard shipments and cargo that requires elevated document control.
china.bodyParagraph2: We manage the full delivery cycle, from supplier negotiations and pick-up across different regions of China to consolidation, export documents, and transit control through multiple jurisdictions. Acting as a single logistics operator, we reduce the risk of delays and operational downtime across the chain.

cases.title: China Lane Cases
cases.subtitle: Two project examples with route, shipment profile, support scope, and a short solution summary.

case1.title: Case: Light Industry / Production Launch
case1.route: multiple regions of China -> client's final warehouse

meta.cargo: Cargo type: equipment for a garment factory
meta.extra: Additional services: consolidation, completeness check, customs clearance, insurance

case1.desc1: The project involved more than ten suppliers across different regions of China, each with its own production timeline, packaging requirements, and shipping conditions. That required precise synchronization.
case1.desc2: We organized staged pick-up from different addresses, checked completeness and labeling, arranged temporary storage, and consolidated everything into one shipment. With the factory launch depending on the deadline, the equipment arrived in full and without disruption, allowing production to start without downtime.

case2.title: Case: Electronics / Regulated Cargo
case2.route: Shenzhen -> transit via the EAEU -> client warehouse

meta.extra: Additional services: HS code verification, admissibility consulting, customs support, insurance

case2.desc1: The client purchased a batch of electronic components requiring correct classification and validation for movement through transit countries. A documentation error could have delayed the cargo at the border.
case2.desc2: Our East Asia desk reviewed the documents in advance, aligned the route with current regulatory requirements, and supervised transit control. The cargo was delivered on time without document corrections or additional cost.

air.heroText: We ship urgent cargo on charter and scheduled flights with 24/7 support.
air.bodyParagraph1: Caravan Logistics arranges international air freight for urgent, high-value, and high-tech shipments. We manage the full cycle, from airfreight pricing and flight booking to departure control, arrival coordination, and last-mile delivery. Air freight is the right fit for strict deadlines, production launches, urgent contracts, and high-value cargo. We also account for airline rules, packaging standards, weight and dimension limits, insurance, and customs formalities.
air.bodyParagraph2: As a logistics operator, we coordinate carriers, agents, and terminals while keeping deadlines transparent and each stage under control.

cases.title: Air Freight Cases
cases.subtitle: One project example with route, shipment profile, support scope, and a short solution summary.

case1.title: Case: Electronics / Urgent Production Supply

meta.cargo: Cargo type: electronic modules for a production line
meta.extra: Additional services: insurance, expedited customs clearance, terminal coordination

case1.desc1: The client, a manufacturing company, faced the risk of a production-line shutdown because of a component delay. Sea or rail delivery could not meet the required timeline.
case1.desc2: We calculated the airfreight rate, booked the flight quickly, and prepared the cargo in line with air-carriage requirements. After arrival, we arranged expedited terminal handling and coordinated road delivery to the warehouse. The shipment prevented production downtime and financial losses.

broker.heroText: Our in-house broker team clears cargo of any complexity and supports inspections.
broker.bodyParagraph1: We classify goods, select HS codes, and calculate duties. We prepare the full document package, including invoices, packing lists, certificates of origin, and compliance certificates.
broker.bodyParagraph2: We work closely with customs posts to speed up release. We help clients build the right supply model, reduce risk, and avoid unnecessary extra cost.

warehousing.heroText: Owned and partner warehouses help us consolidate, label, and prepare cargo for onward shipment.
warehousing.bodyParagraph1: We organize bonded storage, customs warehouses, and cross-docking. We label, build kits, and provide photo reports for every operation.
warehousing.bodyParagraph2: We integrate the client's WMS or provide our own reporting system. We prepare cargo for international transport through palletizing, sealing, and document processing.

insurance.heroText: We insure cargo and liability at every stage of the logistics chain.
insurance.bodyParagraph1: We tailor insurance programs to cargo type and route, from standard coverage to expanded war-risk and delay protection with leading insurers.
insurance.bodyParagraph2: We support policy issuance and claims settlement, help prepare documents, manage communication with the insurer, and work toward fast compensation.

footer.description: Discover our full range of road, sea and air freight services. Thanks to advanced technology and a global network we deliver cargo safely and on time.

history.title: History and Growth
history.subtitle: From a small team to a trusted logistics partner.

founded.title: Foundation and the First Step
founded.text: Caravan Logistics began in 2008 with a simple idea: to build dependable logistics without empty promises or hidden risks. A few owned trucks, a small office, and the first clients became the foundation of a company focused on results and responsibility.

system.title: Building the System
system.text: The move to a new office in the city center was more than expansion. It marked the beginning of a structured business model. We started building processes so the company would run as a system, not around individual people, but through a stable management model.

team.title: Team Formation
team.text: The core team took shape: the first generation of logistics specialists who handled larger projects and more complex routes. Business processes became established and started working as a unified mechanism that supported company growth.

expertise.title: Expanding Expertise
expertise.text: Caravan Logistics joined the Chamber of Commerce and Industry of the Kyrgyz Republic and also became a member of the American Chamber of Commerce in Kyrgyzstan, AmCham. This strengthened our position in the international business community and expanded opportunities for partnership, development, and participation in key economic initiatives.

infrastructure.title: Partner Infrastructure and Technology Shift
infrastructure.text: We launched partner warehouses, expanding both geography and delivery speed. The rail freight department was opened as a new line of business that strengthened our multimodal strategy. From a small team and the first clients, we moved toward a fully diversified logistics model.

digital.title: Technology Development
digital.text: The company moved to digital tools and started cooperating with educational institutions, building a talent pipeline and investing in the future of the industry.

newDirections.title: New Directions
newDirections.text: A separate East Asia lane was launched, including shipments from China to the CIS, which strengthened our position in international logistics. We also built a full air-freight department as an independent business line within Caravan Logistics. We are developing air logistics systematically and moving to a new level: now we operate confidently in the sky as well.

fullCycle.title: Full Support Cycle
fullCycle.text: The launch of the customs-clearance direction allows us to provide businesses with a full-cycle logistics support model.

items.item1: A conscientious company that truly knows its work.
items.item2: Delivered in the shortest possible time. Real professionals. I will continue working with them.
items.item3: Excellent cargo service. They deliver quickly and keep the goods safe and intact.
items.item4: Excellent and reliable cargo service. Polite and responsible people.

items.item6: Excellent team, true masters of their craft.
items.item7: A very good company, especially the staff, who are real professionals.
items.item9: A reliable company with fast deliveries. I recommend it as one of the best in Kyrgyzstan.

hero.title: We are a logistics company
hero.line1: Since 2008 we arrange road, rail and air freight across the CIS and worldwide.
hero.line2: Over 10,000 shipments delivered and more than 2,000 wagons each year.
hero.line3: We build turnkey routes with full customs support.

services.title: Our services
services.heroText: We provide professional road freight services for domestic and international routes. The team organizes reliable deliveries from Kyrgyzstan to Russia and imports from China to Kyrgyzstan using modern trucks with strict safety and timing control.

auto.bodyParagraph1: Caravan Logistics organizes international road freight across Central Asia, China, the EAEU, and Europe. We provide end-to-end support for trucking projects, from route planning to unloading control, for both one-off shipments and regular business supply flows. We serve manufacturers, developers, distributors, and trading companies. For each shipment, we select the right equipment based on cargo type, tonnage, volume, and urgency, reducing logistics risks and keeping delivery schedules stable.
auto.bodyParagraph2: We cover the full road-freight cycle, from rate calculation and carrier selection to route control, delivery timing, insurance, and customs support. As a logistics operator with a dedicated manager and transparent pricing, we give businesses stable and manageable international logistics.

stats.item1: Shipments and deliveries completed on international routes
stats.item2: Supply projects managed by our logistics and brokerage teams
stats.item3: Clients continue to work with Caravan Logistics every year

upcoming.title: We are preparing smart tools for launch
upcoming.text: We automate customs calculations and HS code search so you get answers in seconds on the site.

card1.title: Calculator — customs assistant
card1.text: Select origin, cargo type and extras — the tool instantly estimates duties and gives you a ready checklist.
card1.small: We are testing formulas and adding AI tips.

card2.title: HS code finder
card2.text: Enter a product name or industry — the service suggests valid codes, requirements, and supply restrictions.
card2.small: We will add fast search across a catalog of 10,000 items.

faq.title: Popular questions
faq.text: Here are quick tips on pricing, timing and documents. Didn’t find the answer? Leave a request and a logistics expert will call you back within minutes.
faq.a1: We build cooperation on transparency: clear calculations, rate justification, market context explanation, and timely feedback. The client should understand what is happening with the cargo and why each decision is made.
faq.a2: We do not operate on short-term gain. Our model is long-term partnership.
faq.a3: Each project is assigned a personal manager who oversees the shipment from quotation to unloading, coordinates carriers, controls documents, and keeps communication transparent at every stage. Every shipment is calculated individually based on cargo, timing, geography, and budget.
faq.a4: The company has an internal control system including calculation checks, compliance with agreed terms, and review of non-standard situations. We systematically analyze errors to prevent repeated incidents.
faq.a5: We treat feedback openly and record every non-standard case for detailed review. Analysis of correspondence, actions, and processes helps us improve the system instead of ignoring the issue.
faq.a6: Our team has practical international transportation experience across China, Southeast Asia, Central Asia, the EAEU, and Europe. This helps us predict risks, account for transit and customs specifics, and handle complex cargo.
faq.a7: We insure shipments in accordance with contract terms. This reduces the client’s financial risks and provides additional protection in non-standard situations.
faq.a8: Our team regularly attends webinars and advanced training courses, and also develops internally through our in-house learning system. We also cooperate with educational institutions, building a talent pipeline and attracting future logistics specialists.

about.heroText: Our company was founded in 2008, and our founder personally worked in transportation as a carrier. Our goal is to create solutions that make logistics faster, more efficient, and more stable while ensuring reliable delivery and minimizing costs. We accelerate your business growth.

card1.title: Own fleet
card1.text: We allocate tilt, reefer or special trucks for each project, supervise drivers 24/7 and arrange permits.

card2.title: Rolling stock access
card2.text: We reserve wagons and platforms, prepare ETRAN documents and guide cargo through border crossings without idle time.

card3.title: Multimodal solutions
card3.text: We combine air deliveries with last-mile trucking, consolidate cargo and insure every leg.

about.valuesText: We work based on responsibility, transparency, and partnership, making decisions that are sustainable for the client, the company, and the market. Our approach is built on system thinking, professionalism, and continuous team development.

contacts.heroText: We respond 24/7 on road, rail and air freight across the CIS and overseas projects.
contacts.formText: Send a request — we will prepare a quote and answer all questions about documents, timing and tariffs.

visit.title: How to find us
visit.scheduleWeekday: The office is open Monday to Friday from 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM.

portfolio.heroText: We share tariffs, routes and technology updates from Caravan Logistics for road, rail and air services.
portfolio.empty: No posts in this section yet.

feature1.title: Caravan Logistics wished partners a Happy New Year
feature1.text1: Each December we wrap up results and prepare personal gifts for clients. In 2024 the team created branded holiday boxes and delivered them to every key office.
feature1.text2: The greetings include thank-you letters and an invitation to a private partners’ club to discuss plans for next year.

feature2.title: Caravan Logistics congratulated partners on the New Year
feature2.text1: The team prepared videos and postcards highlighting 2025 achievements and wishes. Holiday surprises include coupons for extra services.
feature2.text2: We thank clients for their trust and promise even greater engagement in joint projects.

block1.title: Infrastructure focus in the CIS
block1.text: We cooperate with major terminals and border transitions, reserve capacity and move cargo without delays even in peak season.

block2.title: Global routes
block2.text: We ship from China, Turkey, Europe and the USA with consolidation, customs brokerage and insurance on every leg.
